title: polylophium involucratum
intro: Polylophium involucratum, also known as the Alpine Polylophium, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family of Gentianaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its alkaloids, which have been found to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Polylophium involucratum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
